title: Emergency Response Plan for Natural Disasters
scenario: Create a comprehensive emergency response plan for natural disasters such as earthquakes, hurricanes, and floods. The plan should cover topics such as evacuation procedures, emergency contact information, and shelter locations. The plan should be written in a clear and concise manner suitable for emergency responders to use.
constraints: Must be written in a format suitable for emergency responders
Must include a list of emergency contact information

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated plan adheres to the given constraints (format, contents, word count).
The plan includes accurate and up-to-date information on emergency response procedures for natural disasters.
The plan is clear and easy to understand for the target audience (emergency responders).
